title: Improved Genuineness Benchmark & Precise Transformer System (v3)

summary.architecture: 4 layers, 8 heads, 256 d_model - Scaled for mechanistic probing
summary.benchmark: Stabilized across 5 task categories with robust IOI target detection
summary.infrastructure: Automated Kaggle deployment with secure token handling and relaxed dependencies

mechanistic_findings: Identified specialized 'reasoning' circuits in gpt2-xl using a high-precision entropy variance metric.
Causal ablation confirmed the physical necessity of these circuits for Indirect Object Identification (IOI) tasks.
Dual-mode analysis shows a physical separation between induction heads (pattern matching) and genuine heads (dynamic reasoning).
Scaling training data to 2000 samples and 10 epochs improved model convergence on reasoning tasks.
structural_recommendations: Implement adaptive position-based entropy normalization as a standard for mechanistic interpretability.
Use structured prompt/target dictionaries to ensure causal evaluation across diverse architectural scales.
Prefer relaxed version constraints (>=) in cloud-based benchmarking to avoid resolution conflicts with pre-installed PyTorch environments.
Adopt the KaggleFullPipeline automated deployment to ensure metadata consistency and public discoverability.
